description_long: This is a black cargo van with a boxy, utilitarian shape and a slightly worn, matte finish. The left side features a painted green tree, a red heart, and a dollar sign, while the right side displays two white skull graphics. The van has four solid black wheels, tinted windows, and no visible side mirrors. The rear of the van has two large, dark-tinted doors with minimal detailing and no visible license plate. The overall appearance suggests a customized or graffiti-decorated vehicle, likely used for urban transport or delivery.
description: A black, boxy cargo van with graffiti-style art on the sides, tinted windows, and a worn matte finish.
description_view_0: Left side view showing a green tree, red heart, and dollar sign painted on the van's side.
description_view_1: Front view with a plain, dark windshield and no visible grille or headlights.
description_view_2: Right side view featuring two white skull graphics and solid black wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view with two large, dark-tinted doors and no visible license plate.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
